entry.title: 一步步教你SSM整合
entry.content: 1.创建库和表使用MySql数据库 12345678create database ssm_db;use ssm_db;create table account(id int,name varchar(50), money double);insert into account(id,name, money) values(1,'zhangsan', 1000);insert into account(id,name, money) values(2,'lisi', 1000); 2.新建项目环境: IntelliJ IDEA 2017.2.2 x64 jdk1.8.0_121; apache-maven-3.2.1; tomcat7-maven-plugin; 2.1 创建pom工程一个项目通常有很多子模块,创建pom项目用来统一管理依赖,以便统一各个子模块的依赖版本,便于维护. (如果没有多个模块,可以将所有依赖直接添加到项目中.) 填写GroupId 域名反写; ArtifactId 项目名. parent_ssm工程的pom.xml配置如下: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion> <groupId>com.cyy</groupId> <artifactId>parent_ssm</artifactId> <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version> <!-- *************以上为自动生成************* --> <!--声明pom--> <packaging>pom</packaging> <!-- 集中定义依赖版本号 --> <properties> <junit.version>4.10</junit.version> <spring.version>4.1.3.RELEASE</spring.version> <mybatis.version>3.2.8</mybatis.version> <mybatis.spring.version>1.2.2</mybatis.spring.version> <mybatis.paginator.version>1.2.15</mybatis.paginator.version> <mysql.version>5.1.39</mysql.version> <slf4j.version>1.6.4</slf4j.version> <jackson.version>2.4.2</jackson.version> <druid.version>1.0.9</druid.version> <httpclient.version>4.3.5</httpclient.version> <jstl.version>1.2</jstl.version> <servlet-api.version>2.5</servlet-api.version> <jsp-api.version>2.0</jsp-api.version> <joda-time.version>2.5</joda-time.version> <commons-lang3.version>3.3.2</commons-lang3.version> <commons-io.version>1.3.2</commons-io.version> </properties> <!--dependencyManagement 标签:将依赖管理起来,这样子模块要使用哪个依赖,要声明后才能使用.防止将子模块不需要的依赖添加上去--> <dependencyManagement> <dependencies> <!-- 单元测试 --> <dependency> <groupId>junit</groupId> <artifactId>junit</artifactId> <version>${junit.version}</version> </dependency> <!-- Spring --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework</groupId> <artifactId>spring-context</artifactId> <version>${spring.version}</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework</groupId> <artifactId>spring-beans</artifactId> <version>${spring.version}</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework</groupId> <artifactId>spring-webmvc</artifactId> <version>${spring.version}</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework</groupId> <artifactId>spring-jdbc</artifactId> <version>${spring.version}</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework</groupId> <artifactId>spring-aspects</artifactId> <version>${spring.version}</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework</groupId> <artifactId>spring-test</artifactId> <version>${spring.version}</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework</groupId> <artifactId>spring-web</artifactId> <version>${spring.version}</version> </dependency> <!-- Mybatis --> <dependency> <groupId>org.mybatis</groupId> <artifactId>mybatis</artifactId> <version>${mybatis.version}</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.mybatis</groupId> <artifactId>mybatis-spring</artifactId> <version>${mybatis.spring.version}</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>com.github.pagehelper</groupId> <artifactId>pagehelper</artifactId> <version>3.7.5</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>com.github.jsqlparser</groupId> <artifactId>jsqlparser</artifactId> <version>0.9.1</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>com.github.abel533</groupId> <artifactId>mapper</artifactId> <version>2.3.4</version> </dependency> <!-- MySql --> <dependency> <groupId>mysql</groupId> <artifactId>mysql-connector-java</artifactId> <version>${mysql.version}</version> </dependency> <!--打印日志--> <dependency> <groupId>org.slf4j</groupId> <artifactId>slf4j-log4j12</artifactId> <version>${slf4j.version}</version> </dependency> <!-- Jackson Json处理工具包 --> <dependency> <groupId>com.fasterxml.jackson.core</groupId> <artifactId>jackson-databind</artifactId> <version>${jackson.version}</version> </dependency> <!-- 连接池 --> <dependency> <groupId>com.jolbox</groupId> <artifactId>bonecp-spring</artifactId> <version>0.8.0.RELEASE</version> </dependency> <!-- https://mvnrepository.com/artifact/com.alibaba/druid --> <dependency> <groupId>com.alibaba</groupId> <artifactId>druid</artifactId> <version>1.1.10</version> </dependency> <!-- httpclient --> <dependency> <groupId>org.apache.httpcomponents</groupId> <artifactId>httpclient</artifactId> <version>${httpclient.version}</version> </dependency> <!-- JSP相关 --> <dependency> <groupId>jstl</groupId> <artifactId>jstl</artifactId> <version>${jstl.version}</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>javax.servlet</groupId> <artifactId>servlet-api</artifactId> <version>${servlet-api.version}</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>javax.servlet</groupId> <artifactId>jsp-api</artifactId> <version>${jsp-api.version}</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency> <!-- 时间操作组件 --> <dependency> <groupId>joda-time</groupId> <artifactId>joda-time</artifactId> <version>${joda-time.version}</version> </dependency> <!-- Apache工具组件 --> <dependency> <groupId>org.apache.commons</groupId> <artifactId>commons-lang3</artifactId> <version>${commons-lang3.version}</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.apache.commons</groupId> <artifactId>commons-io</artifactId> <version>${commons-io.version}</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>commons-fileupload</groupId> <artifactId>commons-fileupload</artifactId> <version> 1.3.1</version> </dependency> </dependencies> </dependencyManagement> <build> <finalName>${project.artifactId}</finalName> <plugins> <!-- 资源文件拷贝插件 --> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-resources-plugin</artifactId> <version>2.7</version> <configuration> <encoding>UTF-8</encoding> </configuration> </plugin> <!-- java编译插件 --> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.2</version> <configuration> <source>1.7</source> <target>1.7</target> <encoding>UTF-8</encoding> </configuration> </plugin> </plugins> <pluginManagement> <plugins> <!-- 配置Tomcat插件 --> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.tomcat.maven</groupId> <artifactId>tomcat7-maven-plugin</artifactId> <version>2.2</version> </plugin> </plugins> </pluginManagement> </build></project> 2.2 创建子模块选中parent_ssm 右键… 下图:选择None,不将该项目以子模块的形式添加到任何父工程中. 填写 ArtifactId 项目名 将该级目录删掉,使新建的项目路径不在pom工程路径下 2.3添加webapp新建的项目没有webapp 目录,需要手动添加到main目录下 2.4pom.xml文件ssm_demo01 的pom.xml文件如下 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081828384858687888990919293949596979899100101102103104105106107108109110111<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <parent> <artifactId>parent_ssm</artifactId> <groupId>com.cyy</groupId> <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version> <relativePath>../parent_ssm/pom.xml</relativePath> </parent> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion> <artifactId>ssm_demo01</artifactId> <!--以上为自动生成,依赖parent_ssm的配置文件--> <!--设定打包方式,声明项目类型--> <packaging>war</packaging> <build> <plugins> <!-- 配置Tomcat插件 --> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.tomcat.maven</groupId> <artifactId>tomcat7-maven-plugin</artifactId> <version>2.2</version> <configuration> <!--配置项目路径--> <path>/ssm</path> <!--配置端口号--> <port>8080</port> </configuration> </plugin> </plugins> </build> <!--导入依赖包--> <!--由于都是引用parent_ssm中的依赖,所以此处不需要写版本号--> <dependencies> <!-- 单元测试 --> <dependency> <groupId>junit</groupId> <artifactId>junit</artifactId> </dependency> <!-- Spring --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework</groupId> <artifactId>spring-webmvc</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework</groupId> <artifactId>spring-jdbc</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework</groupId> <artifactId>spring-aspects</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework</groupId> <artifactId>spring-test</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework</groupId> <artifactId>spring-web</artifactId> </dependency> <!-- Mybatis --> <dependency> <groupId>org.mybatis</groupId> <artifactId>mybatis</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.mybatis</groupId> <artifactId>mybatis-spring</artifactId> </dependency> <!-- MySql --> <dependency> <groupId>mysql</groupId> <artifactId>mysql-connector-java</artifactId> </dependency> <!--打印日志--> <dependency> <groupId>org.slf4j</groupId> <artifactId>slf4j-log4j12</artifactId> </dependency> <!--连接池--> <dependency> <groupId>com.alibaba</groupId> <artifactId>druid</artifactId> </dependency> <!-- JSP相关 --> <dependency> <groupId>jstl</groupId> <artifactId>jstl</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>javax.servlet</groupId> <artifactId>servlet-api</artifactId> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>javax.servlet</groupId> <artifactId>jsp-api</artifactId> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency> </dependencies></project> 2.5导入jdbc 和日志配置文件 jdbc.properties 修改成你的数据库和用户名密码 1234jdbc.driverClassName=com.mysql.jdbc.Driverjdbc.url=jdbc:mysql://127.0.0.1:3306/ssm_db?useUnicode=true&characterEncoding=utf8&autoReconnect=true&allowMultiQueries=truejdbc.username=rootjdbc.password=123456 log4j.properties 1234567log4j.rootLogger=DEBUG,A1log4j.logger.com.taotao = DEBUGlog4j.logger.org.mybatis = DEBUGlog4j.appender.A1=org.apache.log4j.ConsoleAppenderlog4j.appender.A1.layout=org.apache.log4j.PatternLayoutlog4j.appender.A1.layout.ConversionPattern=%-d{yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss,SSS} [%t] [%c]-[%p] %m%n 3.数据层 spring 和Mybatis整合 3.1 接口AccoutMapper.java 12345678910111213141516171819202122package com.cyy.mapper;import org.apache.ibatis.annotations.Param;public interface AccountMapper { /** * 转出 * @param outName * @param money */ public void out(@Param("outName") String outName,@Param("money") double money); /** * 转入 * @param inName * @param money */ public void in(@Param("inName") String inName,@Param("money") double money);} 3.2 mapper映射文件AccountMapper.xml 注意:在创建AccountMapper.xml 的文件路径时,最好一级一级创建.若连续创建多级时,每一级以/隔开 如:com/cyy/mapper 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?><!DOCTYPE mapper PUBLIC "-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN" "http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd"><!-- xml文件的namespace必须是 mapper接口的全路径--><mapper namespace="com.cyy.mapper.AccountMapper"> <!-- 定义一条sql语句, 其实就是一个 statement select 代表是查询语句, 与其类似的还有 insert, update, delete等 id : 这条sql语句的唯一标识,自定义,但是不能和其他sql语句重复 parameterType: sql语句需要的参数类型, 需要写 类的全路径,可选 resultType: sql语句返回的结果类型,基本类型和与数据库表对应的javabean可以直接写.可选 resultMap:用于多表查询 --> <!--statement的id 要与接口的方法名保持一致--> <update id="out" > <!--这里写具体的sql语句, #{}是占位符, 编译时会被替换成?, 然后注入真实参数 一个参数时，可以随便写； 多个参数时，要结合接口方法中的@Param("**"),占位符里的内容与** 一致--> UPDATE account SET money = money-#{money} WHERE NAME = #{outName}; </update> <update id="in"> UPDATE account SET money = money+#{money} WHERE NAME = #{outName}; </update></mapper> 3.3 mabatis配置文件mabatis-config.xml 123456789101112131415<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?><!DOCTYPE configuration PUBLIC "-//mybatis.org//DTD Config 3.0//EN" "http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-config.dtd"><configuration> <!--配置匹配驼峰命名法--> <!--匹配数据库表中字段的***_***这种命名规则,本次demo并不用--> <settings> <setting name="mapUnderscoreToCamelCase" value="true"/> </settings> <!--其他配置,放到Spring的配置文件中--></configuration> 3.4 spring配置文件-数据库相关applicationContext_dao.xml 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><beans xmlns="http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:context="http://www.springframework.org/schema/context" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans/spring-beans.xsd http://www.springframework.org/schema/context http://www.springframework.org/schema/context/spring-context.xsd"> <!--关联jdbc.properties--> <context:property-placeholder location="classpath:jdbc.properties"/> <!--配置数据库连接池--> <bean id="dataSources" class="com.alibaba.druid.pool.DruidDataSource"> <property name="driverClassName" value="${jdbc.driverClassName}"/> <property name="url" value="${jdbc.url}"/> <property name="username" value="${jdbc.username}"/> <property name="password" value="${jdbc.password}"/> </bean> <!--配置SqlSessionFactoryBean--> <bean id="sessionFactory" class="org.mybatis.spring.SqlSessionFactoryBean"> <!--关联数据库连接池--> <property name="dataSource" ref="dataSources"/> <!--关联mybatis配置文件--> <property name="configLocation" value="classpath:mybatis/mybatis-config.xml"/> <!--给包起别名,扫描包下所有文件,以文件名匹配--> <property name="typeAliasesPackage" value="com.cyy.bo"/> </bean> <!--配置扫描mapper接口和mapper映射文件,,生成mapper接口的实现类--> <bean class="org.mybatis.spring.mapper.MapperScannerConfigurer"> <property name="basePackage" value="com.cyy.mapper"/> </bean></beans> 3.5测试在接口类中右键: 选择要测试的方法 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031package com.cyy.mapper;import org.junit.Test;import org.junit.runner.RunWith;import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;import org.springframework.test.context.ContextConfiguration;import org.springframework.test.context.junit4.SpringJUnit4ClassRunner;import static org.junit.Assert.*;@RunWith(SpringJUnit4ClassRunner.class)@ContextConfiguration(locations = "classpath:spring/applicationContext_dao.xml")public class AccountMapperTest {// 注以下两种注解都可以// 根据给的值注入// @Value("#{accountMapper}")// 根据类型注入,有报错是编译工具的问题,不影响程序执行 @Autowired private AccountMapper accountMapper; @Test public void out() throws Exception { accountMapper.out("zhangsan",100); } @Test public void in() throws Exception { accountMapper.in("lisi",100); }} 4.业务层 spring组件扫描和事务 4.1 接口123456package com.cyy.service;public interface AccountService { public void transfer(String outName,String inName,double money);} 4.2 实现类12345678910111213141516171819202122package com.cyy.service.impl;import com.cyy.mapper.AccountMapper;import com.cyy.service.AccountService;import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;@Service("accountService")public class AccountServiceImpl implements AccountService { @Value("#{accountMapper}")// @Autowired private AccountMapper accountMapper; @Override public void transfer(String outName, String inName, double money) { accountMapper.out(outName,money); accountMapper.in(inName,money); }} 4.3 配置文件applicationContext-service.xml 1234567891011<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><beans xmlns="http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:context="http://www.springframework.org/schema/context" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans/spring-beans.xsd http://www.springframework.org/schema/context http://www.springframework.org/schema/context/spring-context.xsd"> <!--组件扫描--> <context:component-scan base-package="com.cyy.service.impl"/></beans> 4.4 测试12345678910111213141516171819202122232425package com.cyy.service.impl;import com.cyy.service.AccountService;import org.junit.Test;import org.junit.runner.RunWith;import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;import org.springframework.test.context.ContextConfiguration;import org.springframework.test.context.junit4.SpringJUnit4ClassRunner;import static org.junit.Assert.*;@RunWith(SpringJUnit4ClassRunner.class)@ContextConfiguration(locations = "classpath:spring/applicationContext_*.xml")public class AccountServiceImplTest {// @Value("#{accountService}") @Autowired private AccountService accountService; @Test public void transfer() throws Exception { accountService.transfer("zhangsan","lisi",200); }} 4.5 添加事务如果逻辑需要添加事务,则在业务实现类的方法上注明:@Transactional 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526package com.cyy.service.impl;import com.cyy.mapper.AccountMapper;import com.cyy.service.AccountService;import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;@Service("accountService")public class AccountServiceImpl implements AccountService {// @Value("#{accountMapper}") @Autowired private AccountMapper accountMapper; // @Transactional 给当前方法增加事务, 把方法内的操作作为一个整体,要么全成功,要么全失败 @Transactional @Override public void transfer(String outName, String inName, double money) { accountMapper.out(outName,money);//测试事务// int i = 1/0; accountMapper.in(inName,money); }} 在applicationContext-service.xml 中声明注解 注:dataSources 是从applicationContext-dao.xml 中引入的,编译工具会报红,不影响程序. 1234567891011121314151617<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><beans xmlns="http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:context="http://www.springframework.org/schema/context" xmlns:tx="http://www.springframework.org/schema/tx" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans/spring-beans.xsd http://www.springframework.org/schema/context http://www.springframework.org/schema/context/spring-context.xsd http://www.springframework.org/schema/tx http://www.springframework.org/schema/tx/spring-tx.xsd"> <!--扫描包--> <context:component-scan base-package="com.cyy.service.impl"/> <!--注册一个事务管理器--> <bean id="transactionManager" class="org.springframework.jdbc.datasource.DataSourceTransactionManager"> <property name="dataSource" ref="dataSources"/> </bean> <!--配置支持事务注解,需要一个事务管理器--> <tx:annotation-driven transaction-manager="transactionManager"/></beans> 5.web层 springMVC环境搭建 5.1处理器类AccountController.java 123456789101112131415161718192021package com.cyy.controller;import org.springframework.stereotype.Controller;import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestParam;import org.springframework.web.servlet.ModelAndView;@Controller@RequestMapping("account")public class AccountController { @RequestMapping("transfer") public ModelAndView transfer(@RequestParam("outName") String outName, @RequestParam("inName") String inName,@RequestParam("money") double money){ ModelAndView mv = new ModelAndView(); mv.setViewName("index"); mv.addObject("message","转账成功"); return mv; }} 5.2 springMVC 配置文件springmvc-servlet.xml 123456789101112131415161718192021<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><beans xmlns="http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:mvc="http://www.springframework.org/schema/mvc" xmlns:context="http://www.springframework.org/schema/context" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans/spring-beans.xsd http://www.springframework.org/schema/mvc http://www.springframework.org/schema/mvc/spring-mvc.xsd http://www.springframework.org/schema/context http://www.springframework.org/schema/context/spring-context.xsd"> <!--配置映射器,适配器--> <mvc:annotation-driven/> <!--组件扫描处理器--> <context:component-scan base-package="com.cyy.controller"/> <!--配置视图解析器--> <!--前缀+视图名+后缀 即:/WEB-INF/views/index.js--> <bean class="org.springframework.web.servlet.view.InternalResourceViewResolver"> <!--前缀--> <property name="prefix" value="/WEB-INF/views/"/> <!--后缀--> <property name="suffix" value=".jsp"/> </bean></beans> 5.3 配置控制器web.xml 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829<!DOCTYPE web-app PUBLIC "-//Sun Microsystems, Inc.//DTD Web Application 2.3//EN" "http://java.sun.com/dtd/web-app_2_3.dtd" ><web-app> <display-name>Archetype Created Web Application</display-name> <!--配置springmvc环境,控制器--> <servlet> <servlet-name>springmvc</servlet-name> <servlet-class>org.springframework.web.servlet.DispatcherServlet</servlet-class> <init-param> <param-name>contextConfigLocation</param-name> <param-value>classpath:springmvc/springmvc-servlet.xml</param-value> </init-param> <load-on-startup>1</load-on-startup> </servlet> <servlet-mapping> <servlet-name>springmvc</servlet-name> <!-- /* 匹配所有url, 坚决不用 / 匹配jsp以外的url *.do 匹配以.do结尾的url --> <url-pattern>*.do</url-pattern> </servlet-mapping></web-app> 5.4 页面index.jsp 123456789<%@ page contentType="text/html;charset=UTF-8" language="java" isELIgnored="false" %><html><head> <title>Title</title></head><body><span style="color: blue ;font-size: 30px">${message}</span></body></html> 5.5测试http://localhost:8080/ssm/account/transfer.do?outName=zhangsan&inName=lisi&money=100 6.spring和web整合 6.1controller注入业务类12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728package com.cyy.controller;import com.cyy.service.AccountService;import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;import org.springframework.stereotype.Controller;import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestParam;import org.springframework.web.servlet.ModelAndView;@Controller@RequestMapping("account")public class AccountController { @Value("#{accountService}") private AccountService accountService; @RequestMapping("transfer") public ModelAndView transfer(@RequestParam("outName") String outName, @RequestParam("inName") String inName,@RequestParam("money") double money){ accountService.transfer(outName,inName,money); ModelAndView mv = new ModelAndView(); mv.setViewName("index"); mv.addObject("message","转账成功"); return mv; }} 6.2实例化spring容器12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940<!DOCTYPE web-app PUBLIC "-//Sun Microsystems, Inc.//DTD Web Application 2.3//EN" "http://java.sun.com/dtd/web-app_2_3.dtd" ><web-app> <display-name>Archetype Created Web Application</display-name> <!--通知监听器spring配置文件的位置--> <context-param> <param-name>contextConfigLocation</param-name> <param-value>classpath:spring/applicationContext_*.xml</param-value> </context-param> <!--目的: 当项目启动后,立刻实例化spring容器--> <listener> <listener-class>org.springframework.web.context.ContextLoaderListener</listener-class> </listener> <!--配置springmvc环境,控制器--> <servlet> <servlet-name>springmvc</servlet-name> <servlet-class>org.springframework.web.servlet.DispatcherServlet</servlet-class> <init-param> <param-name>contextConfigLocation</param-name> <param-value>classpath:springmvc/springmvc-servlet.xml</param-value> </init-param> <load-on-startup>1</load-on-startup> </servlet> <servlet-mapping> <servlet-name>springmvc</servlet-name> <!-- /* 匹配所有url, 坚决不用 / 匹配jsp以外的url *.do 匹配以.do结尾的url --> <url-pattern>*.do</url-pattern> </servlet-mapping></web-app> 6.3测试http://localhost:8080/ssm/account/transfer.do?outName=zhangsan&inName=lisi&money=100 数据库

entry.title: 如何构建你自己基于以太坊的ERC20令牌并且在接下来的20分钟内启动ICO
entry.content: 如何构建你自己基于以太坊的ERC20令牌并且在接下来的20分钟内启动ICO更新：我写了一本关于以太坊智能合约的书，这本书可以在LeanPub上购买，如果你对了解更多关于合约和构建去中心化App感兴趣，你可以随意的尝试一下。 ​ 如果您正在寻找先进的东西，如预售，公开销售，折扣，目标，硬帽等，请查看我最新的文章。 最近我正在深入的研究区块链和去中心化应用以自学和提高我的知识，为了让学习过程更加有趣我决定去构建我自己基于以太坊的代币并去理解发行ICO的过程（首次铸币发行）。 ​ 这篇文章的目的是通过发行一个简单的demo ICO让你了解智能合约如何在以太坊中工作的。 ​ 让hashcode成为你讨论所有加密相关的核心，看看我们的加密社区并且加入到区块链相关的讨论中。 基础 这里有一些基础的术语我们将要在这篇文章中用到，如果你已经熟悉这些概念，随你跳过接下来的部分。 基于以太坊 ERC20代币：在以太坊中代币可以代表任何可以贸易的物品列如货币，积分等。你可以创建你自己的基于以太坊的加密货币。此外基于这套标准的益处是你的代币可以兼容任何基于同样标准的客户端和钱包。 智能合约：智能合约是发布在以太坊区块链中自执行的代码块，他们包含数据和功能代码，合约可以做决定，和其他合约互动，存储数据，在用户间交易以太（以太坊区块链中加密货币单位）。 Solidity：一种写智能合约的语言。 MetaMask/Mist/MEW Wallet：一种可以保存你的以太和其他基于以太坊代币的数字设备。 现在你已经知道了用在这篇文中的基础属于，让我们开始吧。 步骤 1 代码打开自己喜欢的文本编辑器并且粘贴下面的代码：  solidity ^0.4.4;contract Token { /// @return total amount of tokens function totalSupply() constant returns (uint256 supply) {} /// @param _owner The address from which the balance will be retrieved /// @return The balance function balanceOf(address _owner) constant returns (uint256 balance) {} /// @notice send `_value` token to `_to` from `msg.sender` /// @param _to The address of the recipient /// @param _value The amount of token to be transferred /// @return Whether the transfer was successful or not function transfer(address _to, uint256 _value) returns (bool success) {} /// @notice send `_value` token to `_to` from `_from` on the condition it is approved by `_from` /// @param _from The address of the sender /// @param _to The address of the recipient /// @param _value The amount of token to be transferred /// @return Whether the transfer was successful or not function transferFrom(address _from, address _to, uint256 _value) returns (bool success) {} /// @notice `msg.sender` approves `_addr` to spend `_value` tokens /// @param _spender The address of the account able to transfer the tokens /// @param _value The amount of wei to be approved for transfer /// @return Whether the approval was successful or not function approve(address _spender, uint256 _value) returns (bool success) {} /// @param _owner The address of the account owning tokens /// @param _spender The address of the account able to transfer the tokens /// @return Amount of remaining tokens allowed to spent function allowance(address _owner, address _spender) constant returns (uint256 remaining) {} event Transfer(address indexed _from, address indexed _to, uint256 _value); event Approval(address indexed _owner, address indexed _spender, uint256 _value);}contract StandardToken is Token { function transfer(address _to, uint256 _value) returns (bool success) { //Default assumes totalSupply can't be over max (2^256 - 1). //If your token leaves out totalSupply and can issue more tokens as time goes on, you need to check if it doesn't wrap. //Replace the if with this one instead. //if (balances[msg.sender] >= _value && balances[_to] + _value > balances[_to]) { if (balances[msg.sender] >= _value && _value > 0) { balances[msg.sender] -= _value; balances[_to] += _value; Transfer(msg.sender, _to, _value); return true; } else { return false; } } function transferFrom(address _from, address _to, uint256 _value) returns (bool success) { //same as above. Replace this line with the following if you want to protect against wrapping uints. //if (balances[_from] >= _value && allowed[_from][msg.sender] >= _value && balances[_to] + _value > balances[_to]) { if (balances[_from] >= _value && allowed[_from][msg.sender] >= _value && _value > 0) { balances[_to] += _value; balances[_from] -= _value; allowed[_from][msg.sender] -= _value; Transfer(_from, _to, _value); return true; } else { return false; } } function balanceOf(address _owner) constant returns (uint256 balance) { return balances[_owner]; } function approve(address _spender, uint256 _value) returns (bool success) { allowed[msg.sender][_spender] = _value; Approval(msg.sender, _spender, _value); return true; } function allowance(address _owner, address _spender) constant returns (uint256 remaining) { return allowed[_owner][_spender]; } mapping (address => uint256) balances; mapping (address => mapping (address => uint256)) allowed; uint256 public totalSupply;}contract HashnodeTestCoin is StandardToken { // CHANGE THIS. Update the contract name. /* Public variables of the token */ /* NOTE: The following variables are OPTIONAL vanities. One does not have to include them. They allow one to customise the token contract & in no way influences the core functionality. Some wallets/interfaces might not even bother to look at this information. */ string public name; // Token Name uint8 public decimals; // How many decimals to show. To be standard complicant keep it 18 string public symbol; // An identifier: eg SBX, XPR etc.. string public version = 'H1.0'; uint256 public unitsOneEthCanBuy; // How many units of your coin can be bought by 1 ETH? uint256 public totalEthInWei; // WEI is the smallest unit of ETH (the equivalent of cent in USD or satoshi in BTC). We'll store the total ETH raised via our ICO here. address public fundsWallet; // Where should the raised ETH go? // This is a constructor function // which means the following function name has to match the contract name declared above function HashnodeTestCoin() { balances[msg.sender] = 1000000000000000000000; // Give the creator all initial tokens. This is set to 1000 for example. If you want your initial tokens to be X and your decimal is 5, set this value to X * 100000. (CHANGE THIS) totalSupply = 1000000000000000000000; // Update total supply (1000 for example) (CHANGE THIS) name = "HashnodeTestCoin"; // Set the name for display purposes (CHANGE THIS) decimals = 18; // Amount of decimals for display purposes (CHANGE THIS) symbol = "HTCN"; // Set the symbol for display purposes (CHANGE THIS) unitsOneEthCanBuy = 10; // Set the price of your token for the ICO (CHANGE THIS) fundsWallet = msg.sender; // The owner of the contract gets ETH } function() payable{ totalEthInWei = totalEthInWei + msg.value; uint256 amount = msg.value * unitsOneEthCanBuy; require(balances[fundsWallet] >= amount); balances[fundsWallet] = balances[fundsWallet] - amount; balances[msg.sender] = balances[msg.sender] + amount; Transfer(fundsWallet, msg.sender, amount); // Broadcast a message to the blockchain //Transfer ether to fundsWallet fundsWallet.transfer(msg.value); } /* Approves and then calls the receiving contract */ function approveAndCall(address _spender, uint256 _value, bytes _extraData) returns (bool success) { allowed[msg.sender][_spender] = _value; Approval(msg.sender, _spender, _value); //call the receiveApproval function on the contract you want to be notified. This crafts the function signature manually so one doesn't have to include a contract in here just for this. //receiveApproval(address _from, uint256 _value, address _tokenContract, bytes _extraData) //it is assumed that when does this that the call *should* succeed, otherwise one would use vanilla approve instead. if(!_spender.call(bytes4(bytes32(sha3("receiveApproval(address,uint256,address,bytes)"))), msg.sender, _value, this, _extraData)) { throw; } return true; }} 基于来自令牌工厂的原始来源。 ​ 上面的代码用Solidity语言构建了一个简单的ERC20代币，代码注释很好并且非常容易理解，一旦你将代码粘贴到了你的文本编辑器中，找到这些字：”Change This”，这些是需要你基于自己代币特征去改变的，在上面的例子中，我把我的代币命名为 HashnodeTestCoin(HTCN)，总的供应量不超过1000，但是人们可以持有代币的最小0.000000000000000001 ，由于他有18个小数的位置。此外，合约的拥有者（一个执行合约的人）持有所有的初始代币，我设置的ICO价格如下： ​ 1ETH=10HTCN ​ 他的意思是，如果一个人给这个智能合约发送了一个以太坊，他们将要得到10个HTCN。 Step 2​ 下载一个谷歌的插件 MetaMask去生成一个钱包，这将是智能合约的拥有者，除此之外你还可以选择Mist或者My Ether Wallet，为了简单起见这里让我们在这个项目中用Meat Mask插件。 ​ 下载这个插件之后，继续并且创建一个新的受密码保护的账户，然后可以在左上角选择”Ropsten TestNet”，在我们把合约发不到主网络上之前，我们将要在测试网络上测试他并且确认每件事都按预期运行，它看起来像这样： 现在我们转向Remix IDE（一个在线的Solidity编译器和调试器）并且粘贴你刚刚修改的代码，忽略任何你看到的警告，接下来转到设置，如果选中了”Enable Optimizations”，则取消选中。 现在转向”Run”选项卡并点击你代币上的create按钮。 ​ 一旦你点击了创建，MetaMask将要提示你去买一些测试的以太币并且提交这个交易，他看起来是这样： 只要确认你在Ropsten测试网络上不在主网络上然后点击提交，现在再次打开MetaMask然后点击第一条交易，它将要带你去Etherscan，在哪你可以查看正在进行的交易，他也许话费30秒中去提交这个交易，一旦提交成功，它看起来像下面这样： Viola!! 你仅仅发布了你的合约，记住上面交易单中的这个”to”地址，这是你的合约地址。 现在是验证你的合约是否有效的时候了。 Step 3​ 理想状态下如果你设置的没问题你应该可以收到所有的初始代币（在我的案例中是1000），当你把它添加到你的钱包时。因此，你需要拷贝这个合约地址，转到MetaMask–>添加代币并且粘贴地址,它看起来像这样： 点击Add并刷新MetaMask，你现在应该可以看到所有的初始供应量（在我的钱包中是1000HTCN）。 Step 4​ 现在一切都完美了，我们只要去验证一下我们的智能合约，让区块链中的每个人都可以阅读和理解，因为它总是可以帮助建立信任，所以验证总是一个好的实践。 ​ 现在转到我们的合约地址，并且点击Contract Code标签。 ​ 现在点击”verify and publish “链接，你一旦跳转到了新的页面，填充一下细节，例如编译版本，启动优化等，并且粘贴我们在第一步编译的Solidity源代码。 ​ 确认选择的编译器版本和你再第一次编译代码时的那个版本匹配。现在点击”verify and publish “，如果成功，他将要生成字节码和API，如下所示： ​ 祝贺，现在任何人可以访问你的合约地址和阅读源代码。 Step 5​ 发布你的合约到生产环境，你仅仅需要在MetaMask中切换测试网络到主网络（在左上角的位置）并且重复第2到4步，请你注意的是在那里部署你的合约你将要话费真实的以太币，因此，你还有充分准备好之前不要部署你的合约（合约是不可变的并且不能更新的一旦你部署后），我们在本教程中继续使用测试网络。 用以太币买代币作为ICO的一部分，你的用户将要通过支付以太币的方式在你那里购买代币，你还记的你在发布合约的时候设置的价格是1ETH=10HTCH ? 因此，你的用户想要通过你的ICO在你那里购买10 HTCH，他们需要支付1ETH，让我们测试它。 ​ 转到MetaMask，创建一个新的账户并且用一些测试以太币加载它，一旦这个账户被加载了，点击”Send”并且填写上你的合约地址，在数字字段中，输入2（ETH）。 ​ 接下来，发送两个以太币给你的合约地址，并且等待这个交易被确认，刷新MetaMask并且在几秒后检查你的代币数量，这个新的测试账户将要得到20个HTCN（你的配置不同可能会有所不同），并且合约拥有者（你）应该有980个（类似数量的）代币。 此外，你将要收到2个以太币。 恭喜成功。 发行一个ICO页面​ 为了展示通过你的ICO项目筹集到了多少以太币，我们将要用到一个被称作web3.js 的javascript类库在我们的项目中。 ​ 转向hash节点测试ICO硬币，检查代码的最后一个script标签，他是相当的简单并且仅仅用到了web3.js和来自你合约的ABI。 ​ 恭喜你走了这么远，一定要记住，一个真实的生产环境的交易合约和ICO需要付出很大的努力和通过全面测试的支持，虽然这个教程给你提供了为ICO写合约的概述，但是他不能用于生产级别的部署，没有通过全面的测试不要在主网络上发布它! ​ 谢谢你都这篇文章，如果你有任何的问题，请随意的评论。 ​ 有关于区块链相关的问题？在hash节点上检验这些加密社区，并开始讨论。 原文：https://hashnode.com/post/how-to-build-your-own-ethereum-based-erc20-token-and-launch-an-ico-in-next-20-minutes-cjbcpwzec01c93awtbij90uzn
